topic: End-of-service calculations done in seconds instead of spreadsheet hours
format: Walk through the before and after in precise detail — same task, completely different experience from start to finish
post:
Friday afternoon. An employee resigns after 6 years and 4 months.

Old way: open the spreadsheet, find the hire date, calculate the exact tenure, apply the Oman Labour Law gratuity bands, check the last three months' basic salary, account for unpaid leave deductions — then double-check everything because one wrong formula costs you thousands.

One HR manager in Muscat told us that process took her 2.5 hours. Every single time.

With SmartPro Hub, the contract start date, salary history, and leave records are already there. You run the end-of-service calculation in under 90 seconds. The breakdown is itemised, audit-ready, and exportable.

Same employee. Same Oman Labour Law. Completely different afternoon.

At 20 staff that time saving is noticeable. At 50 or 100+ it starts to matter in a bigger way — particularly when you're handling WPS payroll, SPF contributions, and Omanisation ratios in the same place.

No spreadsheet. No second-guessing. No Friday ruined.

How long does your current end-of-service process take — and when did you last feel fully confident the number was right?

Book a free 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=general
